    - Overall SSC x 40cm x 75% irrigation had a stiatically higher yield compared to SSC x 75cm and Tall x 75cm in Stress condition (75% irrigation)
    
    -Overall SSC x 40cm x 100% irrigation had a stiatically higher yield compared to SSC x 75cm and Tall x 75cm in Non-stress condition (100% irrigation)







```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F,eval=F}
# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Read the data
#data <- read.csv("greece_yield_data_2025.csv")

ssc_data_1 = read_excel("/mnt/data/SSC_2025_water_Naha.xlsx", sheet = 2)

names(ssc_data_1)[9] = "target_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[10] = "interrow_width"
names(ssc_data_1)[15] = "harvest_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[20] = "dry_yield"

data = ssc_data_1
# Calculate the difference between target density and actual harvest density
data <- data %>%
  mutate(density_diff = `target_density` - harvest_density,
         density_diff_pct = (density_diff / target_density) * 100)

# Summary statistics by hybrid
summary_by_hybrid <- data %>%
  group_by(Year,Hybrid) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_density_diff = mean(density_diff),
    mean_density_diff_pct = mean(density_diff_pct),
    sd_density_diff = sd(density_diff),
    sd_density_diff_pct = sd(density_diff_pct),
    n = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(mean_density_diff)

print(summary_by_hybrid)

# Visualize the density differences by hybrid
ggplot(data, aes(x = reorder(Hybrid, density_diff), y = density_diff)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Density Difference by Hybrid",
    x = "Hybrid",
    y = "Density Difference (plants/ha)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# Visualize the percentage density differences by hybrid
ggplot(data, aes(x = reorder(Hybrid, density_diff_pct), y = density_diff_pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Percentage Density Difference by Hybrid",
    x = "Hybrid",
    y = "Density Difference (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# Visualize the relationship between target density and actual harvest density
ggplot(data, aes(x = `Density targted before sowing`, y = harvest_density, color = Hybrid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Target Density vs. Harvest Density",
    x = "Target Density (plants/ha)",
    y = "Harvest Density (plants/ha)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# Visualize the relationship between target density and density difference
ggplot(data, aes(x = `Density targted before sowing`, y = density_diff, color = Hybrid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Target Density vs. Density Difference",
    x = "Target Density (plants/ha)",
    y = "Density Difference (plants/ha)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```



```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F,eval=F}
# Classifying seed quality
# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Read the data
#data <- read.csv("greece_yield_data_2025.csv")

# ==========================================
# 1. Calculate emergence rate metrics
# ==========================================

# Calculate emergence rate (harvest density / target density)
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    emergence_rate = (harvest_density / target_density) * 100,
    density_loss = target_density - harvest_density,
    density_loss_pct = (density_loss / target_density) * 100
  )

# ==========================================
# 2. Explore emergence rate distribution
# ==========================================

# Overall summary statistics
emergence_summary <- data %>%
  summarize(
    mean_emergence = mean(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_emergence = median(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_emergence = sd(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_emergence = min(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_emergence = max(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(emergence_rate, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(emergence_rate, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print("Overall Emergence Rate Statistics:")
print(emergence_summary)

# Distribution plot
ggplot(data, aes(x = emergence_rate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean(emergence_rate)), 
             color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = median(emergence_rate)), 
             color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Emergence Rates",
       subtitle = paste("Mean =", round(mean(data$emergence_rate), 1), 
                       "%, Median =", round(median(data$emergence_rate), 1), "%"),
       x = "Emergence Rate (%)",
       y = "Frequency") +
  theme_bw()

# Box plot by hybrid
ggplot(data, aes(x = reorder(Hybrid, emergence_rate, FUN = median), 
                 y = emergence_rate, fill = Hybrid)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Emergence Rate by Hybrid",
       x = "Hybrid",
       y = "Emergence Rate (%)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ==========================================
# 3. Statistical approach to threshold setting
# ==========================================

# Method 1: Percentile-based thresholds
percentiles <- quantile(data$emergence_rate, 
                       probs = c(0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90), 
                       na.rm = TRUE)

# Method 2: Standard deviation-based thresholds
mean_emerg <- mean(data$emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_emerg <- sd(data$emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

# Method 3: Industry standards (typical corn emergence expectations)
# Based on agronomic literature and industry standards

# ==========================================
# 4. Proposed threshold classification system
# ==========================================

# Approach 1: Data-driven percentile method
classify_emergence_percentile <- function(rate) {
  case_when(
    rate >= percentiles[4] ~ "Excellent",  # Top 25%
    rate >= percentiles[3] ~ "Good",       # 50th-75th percentile
    rate >= percentiles[2] ~ "Fair",       # 25th-50th percentile
    TRUE ~ "Poor"                          # Bottom 25%
  )
}

# Approach 2: Standard deviation method
classify_emergence_sd <- function(rate, mean_val, sd_val) {
  case_when(
    rate >= mean_val + 0.5 * sd_val ~ "Excellent",
    rate >= mean_val ~ "Good",
    rate >= mean_val - 0.5 * sd_val ~ "Fair",
    TRUE ~ "Poor"
  )
}

# Approach 3: Agronomic standards (recommended)
# Based on typical corn planting expectations:
# - Excellent: >90% emergence (minimal loss)
# - Good: 80-90% emergence (acceptable loss)
# - Fair: 70-80% emergence (concerning loss)
# - Poor: <70% emergence (unacceptable loss)

classify_emergence_agronomic <- function(rate) {
  case_when(
    rate >= 90 ~ "Excellent",
    rate >= 80 ~ "Good",
    rate >= 70 ~ "Fair",
    TRUE ~ "Poor"
  )
}

# Apply all three classification methods
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    quality_percentile = classify_emergence_percentile(emergence_rate),
    quality_sd = classify_emergence_sd(emergence_rate, mean_emerg, sd_emerg),
    quality_agronomic = classify_emergence_agronomic(emergence_rate)
  )

# ==========================================
# 5. Compare classification methods
# ==========================================

# Summary by each method
cat("\n=== PERCENTILE-BASED CLASSIFICATION ===\n")
table(data$quality_percentile)
cat("\nThresholds:\n")
cat("Excellent: >=", round(percentiles[4], 1), "%\n")
cat("Good: >=", round(percentiles[3], 1), "%\n")
cat("Fair: >=", round(percentiles[2], 1), "%\n")
cat("Poor: <", round(percentiles[2], 1), "%\n")

cat("\n=== STANDARD DEVIATION-BASED CLASSIFICATION ===\n")
table(data$quality_sd)
cat("\nThresholds:\n")
cat("Excellent: >=", round(mean_emerg + 0.5 * sd_emerg, 1), "%\n")
cat("Good: >=", round(mean_emerg, 1), "%\n")
cat("Fair: >=", round(mean_emerg - 0.5 * sd_emerg, 1), "%\n")
cat("Poor: <", round(mean_emerg - 0.5 * sd_emerg, 1), "%\n")

cat("\n=== AGRONOMIC STANDARDS CLASSIFICATION (RECOMMENDED) ===\n")
table(data$quality_agronomic)
cat("\nThresholds:\n")
cat("Excellent: >= 90%\n")
cat("Good: 80-90%\n")
cat("Fair: 70-80%\n")
cat("Poor: < 70%\n")

# ==========================================
# 6. Visualize classifications
# ==========================================

# Create comparison plot
data_long <- data %>%
  dplyr::select(Hybrid, emergence_rate, quality_percentile, quality_sd, quality_agronomic) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("quality_"), 
               names_to = "method", 
               values_to = "classification") %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                        quality_percentile = "Percentile",
                        quality_sd = "Std Dev",
                        quality_agronomic = "Agronomic"))

# Set factor levels for proper ordering
data_long$classification <- factor(data_long$classification, 
                                   levels = c("Excellent", "Good", "Fair", "Poor"))

# Stacked bar chart comparing methods
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = method, fill = classification)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Excellent" = "#2E7D32", 
                               "Good" = "#66BB6A",
                               "Fair" = "#FFA726", 
                               "Poor" = "#E53935")) +
  labs(title = "Comparison of Classification Methods",
       x = "Classification Method",
       y = "Proportion",
       fill = "Seed Quality") +
  theme_bw()

# Scatter plot with agronomic classification
ggplot(data, aes(x = `Density.targted.before.sowing`, 
                 y = harvest_density, 
                 color = quality_agronomic)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 0.9, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#2E7D32") +
  geom_abline(slope = 0.8, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#66BB6A") +
  geom_abline(slope = 0.7, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#FFA726") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Excellent" = "#2E7D32", 
                                "Good" = "#66BB6A",
                                "Fair" = "#FFA726", 
                                "Poor" = "#E53935")) +
  labs(title = "Target vs. Harvest Density with Seed Quality Classification",
       subtitle = "Dashed lines show 100%, 90%, 80%, and 70% emergence",
       x = "Target Density (plants/ha)",
       y = "Harvest Density (plants/ha)",
       color = "Seed Quality") +
  theme_bw()

# ==========================================
# 7. Emergence rate by hybrid and treatment
# ==========================================

# Summary by hybrid
hybrid_emergence <- data %>%
  group_by(Hybrid) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_emergence = mean(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_emergence = sd(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    excellent = sum(quality_agronomic == "Excellent"),
    good = sum(quality_agronomic == "Good"),
    fair = sum(quality_agronomic == "Fair"),
    poor = sum(quality_agronomic == "Poor")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_emergence))

print("\nEmergence Rate by Hybrid:")
print(hybrid_emergence)

# Summary by irrigation
irrigation_emergence <- data %>%
  group_by(Irrigation) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_emergence = mean(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_emergence = sd(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print("\nEmergence Rate by Irrigation:")
print(irrigation_emergence)

# Summary by row spacing
spacing_emergence <- data %>%
  group_by(interrow_width) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_emergence = mean(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_emergence = sd(emergence_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print("\nEmergence Rate by Row Spacing:")
print(spacing_emergence)

# ==========================================
# 8. Recommended threshold function
# ==========================================

# Final recommended classification function
classify_seed_quality <- function(emergence_rate) {
  case_when(
    emergence_rate >= 90 ~ "Excellent",
    emergence_rate >= 80 ~ "Good",
    emergence_rate >= 70 ~ "Fair",
    emergence_rate < 70 ~ "Poor",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# Apply to dataset
data$seed_quality <- classify_seed_quality(data$emergence_rate)

# Create summary table
quality_summary <- data %>%
  group_by(seed_quality) %>%
  summarize(
    count = n(),
    pct = n() / nrow(data) * 100,
    mean_emergence = mean(emergence_rate),
    mean_yield = mean(dry_yield),
    sd_yield = sd(dry_yield)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_emergence))

print("\n=== FINAL SEED QUALITY CLASSIFICATION SUMMARY ===")
print(quality_summary)

# ==========================================
# 9. Relationship between seed quality and yield
# ==========================================

# ANOVA: Does seed quality affect yield?
anova_result <- aov(dry_yield ~ seed_quality, data = data)
summary(anova_result)

# Box plot: Yield by seed quality
ggplot(data, aes(x = seed_quality, y = dry_yield, fill = seed_quality)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Excellent" = "#2E7D32", 
                               "Good" = "#66BB6A",
                               "Fair" = "#FFA726", 
                               "Poor" = "#E53935")) +
  labs(title = "Yield by Seed Quality Classification",
       x = "Seed Quality",
       y = "Dry Yield (t/ha)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ==========================================
# 10. Export results
# ==========================================

# Save classified data
write.csv(data, "greece_yield_data_with_seed_quality.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Create summary report
sink("seed_quality_classification_report.txt")
cat("SEED QUALITY CLASSIFICATION REPORT\n")
cat("==================================\n\n")
cat("Dataset: greece_yield_data_2025.csv\n")
cat("Total observations:", nrow(data), "\n\n")
cat("RECOMMENDED THRESHOLDS (Agronomic Standards):\n")
cat("---------------------------------------------\n")
cat("Excellent: >= 90% emergence (minimal loss)\n")
cat("Good: 80-90% emergence (acceptable loss)\n")
cat("Fair: 70-80% emergence (concerning loss)\n")
cat("Poor: < 70% emergence (unacceptable loss)\n\n")
cat("OVERALL STATISTICS:\n")
cat("-------------------\n")
print(emergence_summary)
cat("\n\nCLASSIFICATION DISTRIBUTION:\n")
cat("----------------------------\n")
print(quality_summary)
cat("\n\nTOP 5 HYBRIDS BY EMERGENCE RATE:\n")
cat("---------------------------------\n")
print(head(hybrid_emergence, 5))
sink()

cat("\nAnalysis complete! Results saved to:\n")
cat("- greece_yield_data_with_seed_quality.csv\n")
cat("- seed_quality_classification_report.txt\n")
```





# Exploratory analysis 2025 season - Density and Uniformity as factors


```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.width=16, fig.height=7}
# Load required packages
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(multcomp)
library(tidyr)

# Import data (assuming it's in a csv file)
# For the code example, I'll use the provided dataset
ssc_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/Copy of SSC_2025_water_Naha_1.xlsx", sheet = 1)

names(ssc_data)[9] = "target_density"
names(ssc_data)[10] = "interrow_width"
names(ssc_data)[15] = "harvest_density"
names(ssc_data)[21] = "dry_yield"
names(ssc_data)[16] = "plot_uniformity"
#renaming hybrids
#ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(Hybrid  = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6836SC(N)", "DKC6836SC_40cm"),"DKC6836SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC7236SC(N)", "DKC7236SC_40cm"),"DKC7236SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "ET6641XYZ(N)", "ET6641SC_40cm","ET6641SC"),"ET6641XYZ",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "DKC6648SC_40cm", "DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"DKC6648SC",Hybrid)))))


# Examine data structure

data=ssc_data
# Convert categorical variables to factors
data$Hybrid <- as.factor(data$Hybrid)
data$Irrigation <- as.factor(data$Irrigation)
data$interrow_width <- as.factor(data$interrow_width)
data$Replicates <- as.factor(data$Replicates)
data$Range <- as.factor(data$Range)

# Create hybrid type variable for analysis
data$hybrid_type <- ifelse(grepl("SC", data$Hybrid), "SC", "Tall")
data$hybrid_type <- ifelse(grepl("XYZ", data$Hybrid), "SC", data$hybrid_type)
data$hybrid_type <- as.factor(data$hybrid_type)

#filter plots with >=7 plot_uniformity ratings
#data = filter(data, plot_uniformity<6)


# Look at the relationship between harvest density and yield
ggplot(data, aes(x = harvest_density, y = dry_yield, color = Irrigation)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(interrow_width ~ hybrid_type) +
  labs(title = "Yield vs Harvest Density",
       x = "Harvest Density (plants/ha)",
       y = "Dry Yield (t/ha)")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))


ggplot(data, aes(x = harvest_density, y = dry_yield, color = Irrigation)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(interrow_width ~ Hybrid) +
  labs(title = "Yield vs Harvest Density",
       x = "Harvest Density (plants/ha)",
       y = "Dry Yield (t/ha)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))


corn_data = data%>%
  group_by(Field) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_yield = mean(dry_yield, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_yield = sd(dry_yield, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_uniformity = mean(plot_uniformity, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_uniformity = sd(plot_uniformity, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

p2 <- ggplot(corn_data, aes(x = Field, y = mean_uniformity, fill = Field)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Plot Uniformity by Location")
p2

ggplot(data, aes(x = plot_uniformity, y = dry_yield, color = Field)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Field) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Yield vs Plot Uniformity by Location")

ggplot(data, aes(x = plot_uniformity, y = dry_yield, color = Field)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(hybrid_type~ Field) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Yield vs Plot Uniformity by Location")


ggplot(data, aes(x = plot_uniformity, y = dry_yield, color = Field)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(Field~Hybrid) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Yield vs Plot Uniformity by Location & Hybrid")
```


# Statistical analysis - 2025 season (Density & plot uniformity impact)


## Testing for density & plot uniformity impact

### Model 1: Density & plot uniformity as covariates

- Harvest density and plot uniformity values were normalized for better interpretation in models

```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
data$harvest_density_c <- scale(data$harvest_density, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]
data$plot_uniformity_c <- scale(data$plot_uniformity, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]


# m1 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + harvest_density_c +plot_uniformity_c+
#              (1|Field/Replicates) +                    # Block effect
#              (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +         # Main plot error (irrigation)
#              (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),  # Sub-plot error
#            data = data)

model1 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + 
                       harvest_density_c + plot_uniformity_c +
                       (1|Field) + (1|Field:Replicates),
               data = data,
               control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))

qqnorm(resid(model1))
qqline(resid(model1))
plot(model1)
Anova(model1, type = 2)
```


```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F,eval=F}
# Center harvest density for better interpretation in models
#data$harvest_density_c <- scale(data$harvest_density, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]

# First fit a full model to assess density effects
# Using split-split plot design structure with proper error terms
m1 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + harvest_density_c +
             (1|Field/Replicates) +                    # Block effect
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +         # Main plot error (irrigation)
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),  # Sub-plot error
           data = data)

# Check model assumptions
qqnorm(resid(m1))
qqline(resid(m1))
plot(m1)
Anova(m1, type = 2)
```


###  Model 2 :-  Density as part of the interaction term to test if desity interacts with other treatments

```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
model2 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + 
                       harvest_density_c + plot_uniformity_c +
                       interrow_width:Field + Irrigation:Field + Hybrid:Field +
                       (1|Field) + (1|Field:Replicates),
               data = data,
               control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))

#summary(model2)
qqnorm(resid(model2))
qqline(resid(model2))
plot(model2)
Anova(model2, type = 2)
```




### Model 3: Full random slopes for treatments by location (complex but comprehensive)


- This allows all treatment effects to vary by location

```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
model3 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + 
                       harvest_density_c + plot_uniformity_c +
                       (1 + interrow_width + Irrigation + Hybrid|Field) + 
                       (1|Field:Replicates),
               data = data,
               control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))

#summary(model2)
qqnorm(resid(model3))
qqline(resid(model3))
plot(model3)
Anova(model3, type = 2)
```

### Model 4: Simplified without three-way interaction


```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
# Model with only density
model4 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ interrow_width + Irrigation + Hybrid +
                       interrow_width:Irrigation + interrow_width:Hybrid + Irrigation:Hybrid +
                       harvest_density_c + plot_uniformity_c +
                       (1|Field) + (1|Field:Replicates),
               data = data,
               control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))

# Check model assumptions
qqnorm(resid(model4))
qqline(resid(model4))
plot(model4)
Anova(model4, type = 2)
```

```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
model5 <- lmer(dry_yield ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid + harvest_density_c +plot_uniformity_c+
             (1|Field/Replicates) +                    # Block effect
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +         # Main plot error (irrigation)
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),  # Sub-plot error
           data = data)

# Check model assumptions
qqnorm(resid(model5))
qqline(resid(model5))
plot(model5)
Anova(model5)
```


### Compare 4 models

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}

anova(model1,model4,model5)
AIC(model1, model4,model5)

# Select the best model (example: using model2)
final_model <- model5

# ==========================================
# 2. Main Analysis: Irrigation × Inter-row Width × Hybrid effects
# ==========================================

# Use the simpler model if density interactions are not significant
# (based on previous test)

# Get Type III ANOVA to test main effects and interactions


# Extract coefficient for density effect
summary(model5)
coef_summary <- summary(model5)$coefficients
density_effect <- coef_summary["harvest_density_c", "Estimate"]
density_p <- coef_summary["harvest_density_c", "Pr(>|t|)"]

cat("Yield change per 1000 plants/ha:", density_effect * 1000, "t/ha, p =", density_p, "\n")


```

### Quantifying variance explanation using R2 values - Density vs Full model

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}

# Model with only density
m_density <- lmer(dry_yield ~ plot_uniformity_c +
                    (1|Field/Replicates) +
                    (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +
                    (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),
                  data = data)

# Calculate R-squared for density-only model
r2_density <- performance::r2(m_density)

# Calculate R-squared for full model
r2_full <- performance::r2(model5)

cat("Variance explained by density alone:", r2_density$R2_marginal, "\n")
cat("Total variance explained by full model:", r2_full$R2_marginal, "\n")
cat("Additional variance explained by treatments:", 
    r2_full$R2_marginal - r2_density$R2_marginal, "\n")

# # Calculate density effect size
# density_sd <- sd(data$harvest_density)
# density_range <- range(data$harvest_density)
# density_range_effect <- diff(density_range) * density_effect
# 
# # Calculate treatment effect ranges
# # Extract predictions across all treatment combinations
# grid <- expand.grid(
#   Irrigation = levels(data$Irrigation),
#   interrow_width = levels(data$interrow_width),
#   Hybrid = levels(data$Hybrid)[1:8],  # Using first 8 hybrids for clarity
#   harvest_density_c = 0
# )
# 
# # Predict values
# predictions <- predict(m1, newdata = grid, re.form = NA)
# grid$predicted <- predictions
# 
# # Calculate ranges by factor
# irrig_range <- tapply(grid$predicted, grid$Irrigation, mean)
# irrig_effect_magnitude <- max(irrig_range) - min(irrig_range)
# 
# row_range <- tapply(grid$predicted, grid$interrow_width, mean)
# row_effect_magnitude <- max(row_range) - min(row_range)
# 
# hybrid_range <- tapply(grid$predicted, grid$Hybrid, mean)
# hybrid_effect_magnitude <- max(hybrid_range) - min(hybrid_range)
# 
# # Compare magnitudes
# effect_magnitudes <- data.frame(
#   Factor = c("Plant Density (full range)", 
#              "Irrigation (100% vs 75%)", 
#              "Row Spacing (75cm vs 40cm)",
#              "Hybrid (best vs worst)"),
#   Magnitude = c(density_range_effect, 
#                 irrig_effect_magnitude, 
#                 row_effect_magnitude, 
#                 hybrid_effect_magnitude)
# )
# 
# ggplot(effect_magnitudes, aes(x = reorder(Factor, Magnitude), y = Magnitude)) +
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkgreen") +
#   coord_flip() +
#   labs(title = "Magnitude of effects on yield (t/ha)",
#        subtitle = "Comparing observed ranges of each factor",
#        x = "", y = "Effect on yield (t/ha)")
```


### Treatment Means - After Adjustmust for Density & Plot uniformity

- Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)

- Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)

- Irrigation × Row spacing interaction

- Hybrid Analysis

- Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid interaction

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
# ==========================================
# 3. Treatment Means Adjusted for Density
# ==========================================
m1 = model5
# Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)
emm_irrig <- emmeans(m1, ~ Irrigation, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
print(emm_irrig)
pairs(emm_irrig)
emm_irrig= cld(emm_irrig, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")
emm_irrig = as.data.frame(emm_irrig)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density & Plot uniformity)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)



# Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)
emm_row <- emmeans(m1, ~ interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
print(emm_row)
pairs(emm_row)
emm_row=cld(emm_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_row = as.data.frame(emm_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_row,aes(reorder(interrow_width ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density & Plot uniformity)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)


# Irrigation × Row spacing interaction
emm_irrig_row <- emmeans(m1, ~ Irrigation * interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
print(emm_irrig_row)
pairs(emm_irrig_row, by = "Irrigation")
emm_irrig_row=cld(emm_irrig_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_irrig_row = as.data.frame(emm_irrig_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig_row,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) + facet_wrap(~interrow_width)+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Irrigation × Row spacing interaction (adjusted for density & Plot uniformity)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

# ==========================================
# 4. Hybrid Analysis
# ==========================================

# Get adjusted means for each hybrid
emm_hybrid <- emmeans(m1, ~ Hybrid, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
print(emm_hybrid)
emm_hybrid=cld(emm_hybrid, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_hybrid = as.data.frame(emm_hybrid)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_hybrid,aes(reorder(Hybrid ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density & Plot uniformity)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)



# ==========================================
# 5. Specific Treatment Combinations
# ==========================================

# Three-way interaction
emm_all <- emmeans(m1, 
                   ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid, 
                  at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
emm_all=cld(emm_all, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

# Plot top combinations
plot_data <- as.data.frame(emm_all)
plot_data$Treatment <- paste(plot_data$Irrigation, plot_data$interrow_width, "cm")




plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith,Hybrid,Irrigation,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)



```

Hybrids:

- DKC6808 vs EW6436XKLZ = DKC6836SC 
- DKC6980 vs EW6846XKLZ = DKC7236SC 
- DKC6625 vs EX6658XKLZ = DKC6648SC 
- Isogenic: ET6641XKYZ compared to DKC6503  



```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.heigth=10, fig.width=10}
plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing = ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_0.75_75","01_DKC6808_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_1_75","02_DKC6808_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_0.75_75","03_DKC6836SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_1_75","04_DKC6836SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC(N)_0.75_40","05_DKC6836SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC(N)_1_40","06_DKC6836SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_0.75_75","07_DKC6980_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_1_75","08_DKC6980_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_0.75_75","09_DKC7236SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_1_75","10_DKC7236SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC(N)_0.75_40","11_DKC7236SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC(N)_1_40","12_DKC7236SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_0.75_75","13_DKC6625_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_1_75","14_DKC6625_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_0.75_75","15_DKC6648SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_1_75","16_DKC6648SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC(N)_0.75_40","17_DKC6648SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC(N)_1_40","18_DKC6648SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_0.75_75","19_DKC6503_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_1_75","20_DKC6503_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_0.75_75","21_ET6641XYZ:75%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_1_75","22_ET6641XYZ:100%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ(N)_0.75_40","23_ET6641XYZ:75%:40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ(N)_1_40","24_ET6641XYZ:100%:40cm",hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith)))))))))))))))))))))))))

plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(rm_check = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6808","DKC6836SC","DKC6836SC(N)"),"rm_check_1",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6980","DKC7236SC","DKC7236SC(N)"),"rm_check_2",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6625","DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"rm_check_3","rm_check_4"))))

#lsmeans_1 = lsmeans_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("75:100:DKC6808","75:75:DKC6808","75:100:DKC6836","75:75:DKC6836","40:100:DKC6836","40:75:DKC6836"),"rm_check_1",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6980","75:75:DKC6980","75:100:DKC7236","75:75:DKC7236","40:100:DKC7236","40:75:DKC7236"),"rm_check_2",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6625","75:75:DKC6625","75:100:DKC6648","75:75:DKC6648","40:100:DKC6648","40:75:DKC6648"),"rm_check_3","rm_check_4"))))


plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,Hybrid,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,-emmean),emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)





# plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(Treatment ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Irrigation - Inter row width (cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
#   #theme_classic() + 
#   theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
#          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
#          axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
#      geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
#                  position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
#             size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+ facet_wrap(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
# print(plot_lsmeans)

```

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.heigth=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield (t/ha))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 2, group = hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~rm_check, scales="free_x")

#+facet_grid(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)
```

# Statistical analysis using 2024 and 2025 data - (Density & plot uniformity impact)

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}

ssc_data_1 = read_excel("/mnt/data/Copy of SSC_2025_water_Naha_1.xlsx", sheet = 2)

names(ssc_data_1)[9] = "target_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[10] = "interrow_width"
names(ssc_data_1)[15] = "harvest_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[21] = "dry_yield"
names(ssc_data_1)[16] = "plot_uniformity"
#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Hybrid  = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6836SC(N)", "DKC6836SC_40cm"),"DKC6836SC(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC7236SC(N)", "DKC7236SC_40cm"),"DKC7236SC(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "ET6641XYZ(N)", "ET6641SC_40cm","ET6641SC"),"ET6641XYZ(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "DKC6648SC_40cm", "DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"DKC6648SC(N)",Hybrid)))))

ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Hybrid  = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6836SC(N)", "DKC6836SC_40cm"),"DKC6836SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC7236SC(N)", "DKC7236SC_40cm"),"DKC7236SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "ET6641XYZ(N)", "ET6641SC_40cm","ET6641SC"),"ET6641XYZ",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "DKC6648SC_40cm", "DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"DKC6648SC",Hybrid)))))

ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436","DKC6836SC","DKC7236SC","ET6641SC","DKC6648SC","ET6641XYZ") 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(Hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))


ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Irrigation  = ifelse(Irrigation %in% c(1.00, 100.00),1,ifelse(Irrigation %in% c(0.75, 75.00),0.75,NA)))

ssc_data_1$Irrigation = as.factor(ssc_data_1$Irrigation)

ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% unite(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith,Hybrid,Irrigation,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_1, !hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith %in% c("ET6641XYZ(N)_1_75","ET6641XYZ(N)_0.75_75"))

```




```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
# Center harvest density for better interpretation in models
data = ssc_data_1

#data = filter(data, plot_uniformity<7)
data$harvest_density_c <- scale(data$harvest_density, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]
data$plot_uniformity_c <- scale(data$plot_uniformity, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]

# First fit a full model to assess density effects
# Using split-split plot design structure with proper error terms
model <- lmer(dry_yield ~ as.factor(Irrigation) * as.factor(interrow_width) * as.factor(Hybrid)  +harvest_density_c+plot_uniformity_c+
             (1|Field/Replicates) +                    # Block effect
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +         # Main plot error (irrigation)
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),  # Sub-plot error
           data = data)

# Check model assumptions
qqnorm(resid(model))
qqline(resid(model))
plot(model)
Anova(model, type = 3)
```

### Treatment Means - After Adjustmust for Density

- Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)

- Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)

- Irrigation × Row spacing interaction

- Hybrid Analysis

- Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid interaction

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
# ==========================================
# 3. Treatment Means Adjusted for Density
# ==========================================

# Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)
emm_irrig <- emmeans(model, ~ Irrigation, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_irrig)
#pairs(emm_irrig)
emm_irrig= cld(emm_irrig, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")
emm_irrig = as.data.frame(emm_irrig)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)



# Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)
emm_row <- emmeans(model, ~ interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_row)
#pairs(emm_row)
emm_row=cld(emm_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_row = as.data.frame(emm_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_row,aes(reorder(interrow_width ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)


# Irrigation × Row spacing interaction
emm_irrig_row <- emmeans(model, ~ Irrigation * interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_irrig_row)
#pairs(emm_irrig_row, by = "Irrigation")
emm_irrig_row=cld(emm_irrig_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_irrig_row = as.data.frame(emm_irrig_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig_row,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) + facet_wrap(~interrow_width)+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Irrigation × Row spacing interaction (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)

# ==========================================
# 4. Hybrid Analysis
# ==========================================

# Get adjusted means for each hybrid
emm_hybrid <- emmeans(model, ~ Hybrid, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_hybrid)
emm_hybrid=cld(emm_hybrid, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_hybrid = as.data.frame(emm_hybrid)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_hybrid,aes(reorder(Hybrid ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)



# ==========================================
# 5. Specific Treatment Combinations
# ==========================================

# Three-way interaction
emm_all <- emmeans(model, 
                   ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid, 
                  at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
emm_all=cld(emm_all, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

# Plot top combinations
plot_data <- as.data.frame(emm_all)
plot_data$Treatment <- paste(plot_data$Irrigation, plot_data$interrow_width, "cm")


plot_data = filter(plot_data,!is.na(emmean))

plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith,Hybrid,Irrigation,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)



```

Hybrids:

- DKC6808 vs EW6436XKLZ = DKC6836SC 
- DKC6980 vs EW6846XKLZ = DKC7236SC 
- DKC6625 vs EX6658XKLZ = DKC6648SC 
- Isogenic: ET6641XKYZ compared to DKC6503  



```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.heigth=10, fig.width=10}
plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing = ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_0.75_75","01_DKC6808_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_1_75","02_DKC6808_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_0.75_75","03_DKC6836SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_1_75","04_DKC6836SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_0.75_40","05_DKC6836SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_1_40","06_DKC6836SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_0.75_75","07_DKC6980_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_1_75","08_DKC6980_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_0.75_75","09_DKC7236SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_1_75","10_DKC7236SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_0.75_40","11_DKC7236SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_1_40","12_DKC7236SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_0.75_75","13_DKC6625_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_1_75","14_DKC6625_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_0.75_75","15_DKC6648SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_1_75","16_DKC6648SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_0.75_40","17_DKC6648SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_1_40","18_DKC6648SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_0.75_75","19_DKC6503_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_1_75","20_DKC6503_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_0.75_75","21_ET6641XYZ:75%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_1_75","22_ET6641XYZ:100%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_0.75_40","23_ET6641XYZ:75%:40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_1_40","24_ET6641XYZ:100%:40cm",hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith)))))))))))))))))))))))))

plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(rm_check = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6808","DKC6836SC","DKC6836SC(N)"),"rm_check_1",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6980","DKC7236SC","DKC7236SC(N)"),"rm_check_2",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6625","DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"rm_check_3","rm_check_4"))))

#lsmeans_1 = lsmeans_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("75:100:DKC6808","75:75:DKC6808","75:100:DKC6836","75:75:DKC6836","40:100:DKC6836","40:75:DKC6836"),"rm_check_1",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6980","75:75:DKC6980","75:100:DKC7236","75:75:DKC7236","40:100:DKC7236","40:75:DKC7236"),"rm_check_2",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6625","75:75:DKC6625","75:100:DKC6648","75:75:DKC6648","40:100:DKC6648","40:75:DKC6648"),"rm_check_3","rm_check_4"))))


plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,Hybrid,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,-emmean),emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)





# plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(Treatment ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Irrigation - Inter row width (cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
#   #theme_classic() + 
#   theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
#          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
#          axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
#      geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
#                  position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
#             size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+ facet_wrap(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
# print(plot_lsmeans)

```


```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.heigth=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield (t/ha))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 2, group = hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9))+facet_grid(~rm_check, scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")

#+facet_grid(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

#plotly::ggplotly(plot_lsmeans)
```


# Statistical analysis 2024 & 2025: SSC vs Tall (Density & plot uniformity impact)

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}

ssc_data_1 = read_excel("/mnt/data/Copy of SSC_2025_water_Naha_1.xlsx", sheet = 2)

names(ssc_data_1)[9] = "target_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[10] = "interrow_width"
names(ssc_data_1)[15] = "harvest_density"
names(ssc_data_1)[21] = "dry_yield"
names(ssc_data_1)[16] = "plot_uniformity"

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Hybrid  = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6836SC(N)", "DKC6836SC_40cm"),"DKC6836SC(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC7236SC(N)", "DKC7236SC_40cm"),"DKC7236SC(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "ET6641XYZ(N)", "ET6641SC_40cm","ET6641SC"),"ET6641XYZ(N)",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "DKC6648SC_40cm", "DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"DKC6648SC(N)",Hybrid)))))

ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Hybrid  = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC6836SC(N)", "DKC6836SC_40cm"),"DKC6836SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("DKC7236SC(N)", "DKC7236SC_40cm"),"DKC7236SC",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "ET6641XYZ(N)", "ET6641SC_40cm","ET6641SC"),"ET6641XYZ",ifelse(Hybrid %in% c( "DKC6648SC_40cm", "DKC6648SC","DKC6648SC(N)"),"DKC6648SC",Hybrid)))))

ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436","DKC6836SC","DKC7236SC","ET6641SC","DKC6648SC","ET6641XYZ") 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(Hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))


ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(Irrigation  = ifelse(Irrigation %in% c(1.00, 100.00),1,ifelse(Irrigation %in% c(0.75, 75.00),0.75,NA)))

ssc_data_1$Irrigation = as.factor(ssc_data_1$Irrigation)

ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% unite(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith,Hybrid,Irrigation,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_1, !hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith %in% c("ET6641XYZ(N)_1_75","ET6641XYZ(N)_0.75_75"))

```




```{r echo=T, message=F, warning=F}
# Center harvest density for better interpretation in models
data = ssc_data_1
#data = filter(data, plot_uniformity<6)
data$harvest_density_c <- scale(data$harvest_density, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]
data$plot_uniformity_c <- scale(data$plot_uniformity, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,1]

# First fit a full model to assess density effects
# Using split-split plot design structure with proper error terms
model <- lmer(dry_yield ~ as.factor(Irrigation) * as.factor(interrow_width) * as.factor(hybrid_type)  +harvest_density_c+plot_uniformity_c+
             (1|Field/Replicates) +                    # Block effect
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation) +         # Main plot error (irrigation)
             (1|Field/Replicates:Irrigation:interrow_width),  # Sub-plot error
           data = data)

# Check model assumptions
qqnorm(resid(model))
qqline(resid(model))
plot(model)
Anova(model, type = 3)
```

### Treatment Means - After Adjustmust for Density

- Irrigation * interrow_width * Hybrid interaction (adjusted for density)

```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
# ==========================================
# 3. Treatment Means Adjusted for Density
# ==========================================

# Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)
emm_irrig <- emmeans(model, ~ Irrigation, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_irrig)
#pairs(emm_irrig)
emm_irrig= cld(emm_irrig, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")
emm_irrig = as.data.frame(emm_irrig)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for irrigation (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)



# Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)
emm_row <- emmeans(model, ~ interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_row)
#pairs(emm_row)
emm_row=cld(emm_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_row = as.data.frame(emm_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_row,aes(reorder(interrow_width ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for row spacing (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)


# Irrigation × Row spacing interaction
emm_irrig_row <- emmeans(model, ~ Irrigation * interrow_width, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_irrig_row)
#pairs(emm_irrig_row, by = "Irrigation")
emm_irrig_row=cld(emm_irrig_row, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_irrig_row = as.data.frame(emm_irrig_row)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_irrig_row,aes(reorder(Irrigation ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) + facet_wrap(~interrow_width)+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Irrigation × Row spacing interaction (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)

# ==========================================
# 4. Hybrid Analysis
# ==========================================

# Get adjusted means for each hybrid
emm_hybrid <- emmeans(model, ~ hybrid_type, at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
#print(emm_hybrid)
emm_hybrid=cld(emm_hybrid, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

emm_hybrid = as.data.frame(emm_hybrid)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(emm_hybrid,aes(reorder(hybrid_type ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
#print(plot_lsmeans)



# ==========================================
# 5. Specific Treatment Combinations
# ==========================================

# Three-way interaction
emm_all <- emmeans(model, 
                   ~ Irrigation * interrow_width * hybrid_type, 
                  at = list(harvest_density_c = 0))
emm_all=cld(emm_all, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey")

# Plot top combinations
plot_data <- as.data.frame(emm_all)
plot_data$Treatment <- paste(plot_data$Irrigation, plot_data$interrow_width, "cm")


plot_data = filter(plot_data,!is.na(emmean))

plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith,hybrid_type,Irrigation,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)



```

Hybrids:

- DKC6808 vs EW6436XKLZ = DKC6836SC 
- DKC6980 vs EW6846XKLZ = DKC7236SC 
- DKC6625 vs EX6658XKLZ = DKC6648SC 
- Isogenic: ET6641XKYZ compared to DKC6503  



```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F, fig.heigth=10, fig.width=10}
plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing = ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_0.75_75","01_DKC6808_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6808_1_75","02_DKC6808_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_0.75_75","03_DKC6836SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_1_75","04_DKC6836SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_0.75_40","05_DKC6836SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6836SC_1_40","06_DKC6836SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_0.75_75","07_DKC6980_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6980_1_75","08_DKC6980_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_0.75_75","09_DKC7236SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_1_75","10_DKC7236SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_0.75_40","11_DKC7236SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC7236SC_1_40","12_DKC7236SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_0.75_75","13_DKC6625_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6625_1_75","14_DKC6625_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_0.75_75","15_DKC6648SC_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_1_75","16_DKC6648SC_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_0.75_40","17_DKC6648SC_75%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6648SC_1_40","18_DKC6648SC_100%_40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_0.75_75","19_DKC6503_75%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "DKC6503_1_75","20_DKC6503_100%_75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_0.75_75","21_ET6641XYZ:75%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_1_75","22_ET6641XYZ:100%:75cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_0.75_40","23_ET6641XYZ:75%:40cm",ifelse(hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith == "ET6641XYZ_1_40","24_ET6641XYZ:100%:40cm",hybrid_irrigation_interrowwdith)))))))))))))))))))))))))


#lsmeans_1 = lsmeans_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(Hybrid %in% c("75:100:DKC6808","75:75:DKC6808","75:100:DKC6836","75:75:DKC6836","40:100:DKC6836","40:75:DKC6836"),"rm_check_1",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6980","75:75:DKC6980","75:100:DKC7236","75:75:DKC7236","40:100:DKC7236","40:75:DKC7236"),"rm_check_2",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density %in% c("75:100:DKC6625","75:75:DKC6625","75:100:DKC6648","75:75:DKC6648","40:100:DKC6648","40:75:DKC6648"),"rm_check_3","rm_check_4"))))


plot_data = plot_data %>% unite(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,hybrid_type,interrow_width, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,-emmean),emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans Dry yield (t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9))+ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data") 
#+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5, group = Hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
           # size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)





# plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(reorder(Treatment ,-emmean),emmean, fill=.group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Irrigation - Inter row width (cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
#   #theme_classic() + 
#   theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
#          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
#          axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
#      geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
#                  position=position_dodge(.9)) +ggtitle("Estimated marginal means for Hybrid (adjusted for density)")+geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 5), vjust = -0.2, 
#             size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+ facet_wrap(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
# print(plot_lsmeans)

```


```{r echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield (t/ha))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 2, group = hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9))+ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")#+facet_grid(~rm_check, scales="free_x")

#+facet_grid(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)


plot_data = plot_data %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot == "tall_75","01_TALL_75cm",ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot == "TALL_75:75" ,"02_TALL_75",ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot ==  "ssc_75","02_SSC_75cm",ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot == "SSC_75:75","04_SSC_75",ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot == "ssc_40","03_SSC_40cm",ifelse(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot == "SSC_40:75","06_SSC_40",hybrid__interrow_cm_plot)))))))

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(plot_data,aes(hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing,emmean, fill=Irrigation))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_irrigation(%)_interrowwdith(cm)")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield (t/ha))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(emmean,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=emmean-SE, ymax=emmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = .group, y = 2, group = hybrid_irrigation_rowspacing), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9))+facet_grid(~hybrid__interrow_cm_plot, scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Statistical analysis of yield (t/ha) across 2 years of trial data")

#+facet_grid(~Hybrid, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)



#plotly::ggplotly(plot_lsmeans)
```
